title: Vachellia insulae-iacobi
taxonomy: Vachellia insulae-iacobi is classified within the family Fabaceae, more specifically within the subfamily Caesalpinioideae. This plant is further classified within the tribe Acacieae. The genus Vachellia is a member of the Acacia genus but has been reclassified due to molecular and morphological differences. Vachellia insulae-iacobi is native to the Galapagos Islands. Its classification is part of ongoing research in the field of botany and taxonomy.

Some studies suggest that extracts from Vachellia insulae-iacobi may have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects.
